description_long: This is a classic, freestanding wooden cabinet with a rectangular profile and a traditional design. The front features two paneled doors with round knobs, providing access to a spacious interior compartment, and two upper drawers with matching knobs for additional storage. The cabinet is adorned with decorative molding along the top and base, giving it an elegant and sturdy appearance. The sides are plain and flat, while the back is unadorned, indicating it is meant to be placed against a wall. The surface finish appears smooth and matte, with a uniform light color throughout. This type of cabinet is suitable for use in urban environments such as entryways, garages, or public spaces for storage and organization.
description: A classic, freestanding wooden cabinet with two paneled doors, two drawers, and decorative molding, finished in a uniform light color.
description_view_0: Front view showing two paneled doors with knobs and two upper drawers, all with matching round handles and decorative molding.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, flat side panel and the depth of the cabinet, with visible molding at the top and base.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a flat, unadorned back panel, suitable for placement against a wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain side panel and decorative molding.
